name: evergreen
description: Evergreen 0.4.0 ships read-only impact discovery, reversible host install, and generalized release identity checks.

plugins.name: evergreen
plugins.description: Ships read-only impact discovery, passive evidence and source maps, reversible Claude/Codex install, doctor, and uninstall, trusted CI semantics, and generalized release identity checks. Three axes — truth, craft, and hygiene — remain language-agnostic and rewrite nothing unasked.
